doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated in the future and proposes a radical interpretation of GDPR scope that has not been adopted or issued by the European Data Protection Board.
response_turn1:
